expectations.text: Response uses the output template format (### [N]. [Topic Title])
expectations.evidence: Response contains '### 1. Service Ownership and Team Capacity' — exact template match.

expectations.text: Response contains exactly one question, not multiple
expectations.evidence: One structured question block with sub-options A-D. No separate second question asked.
Contains '- *Recommendation*: Option A is the least risky...'

expectations.text: Response does NOT deliver a final verdict or summary
expectations.evidence: No final approval or summary present. Ends with the first question only.

expectations.text: Agent notes it used or would use AskUserQuestion tool
expectations.evidence: Section 3 explicitly states: 'Would use: Yes. The skill explicitly requires using the AskUserQuestion tool for each question.'
